use_cases: Displaying a realistic MacBook keyboard in product showcases and landing pages
Interactive keyboard demos for software products and documentation
Visual keyboard shortcut hints in developer tool interfaces
Decorative keyboard illustration for tech-related landing pages
ai_summary: A dark-themed MacBook keyboard component featuring realistic key styling with glass-morphism shadow effects and smooth hover transitions. Individual keys have press-like hover animations with scale and shadow changes. The component uses responsive scaling for different viewport sizes and displays an authentic MacBook keyboard layout with function row, alphanumeric keys, and modifier keys.
